patch:
commit ea4cc2007efeaf14b8a07b967cb0c570e5b59d7c
Author: Yingwei Zheng <dtcxzyw2333@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Oct 16 04:40:10 2023 +0800

    [BasicAA] Remove NSW flags when merging scales (#69122)
    
    When merging scales of `LinearExpression` that have common index
    variables, we cannot guarantee the NSW flag still applies to the merged
    expression.
    
    Fixes #69096.

diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/BasicAliasAnalysis.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/BasicAliasAnalysis.cpp
index c162b8f6edc1..ca65abeb591c 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/BasicAliasAnalysis.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/BasicAliasAnalysis.cpp
@@ -662,6 +662,7 @@ BasicAAResult::DecomposeGEPExpression(const Value *V, const DataLayout &DL,
         if (Decomposed.VarIndices[i].Val.V == LE.Val.V &&
             Decomposed.VarIndices[i].Val.hasSameCastsAs(LE.Val)) {
           Scale += Decomposed.VarIndices[i].Scale;
+          LE.IsNSW = false; // We cannot guarantee nsw for the merge.
           Decomposed.VarIndices.erase(Decomposed.VarIndices.begin() + i);
           break;
         }

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "p:64:64:64"

define i32 @pr69096(i16 %a, ptr %p) {
entry:
  %0 = load i8, ptr %p, align 2
  %dec.i = add i8 %0, -1
  %cmp636.i = icmp eq i16 %a, -1
  br i1 %cmp636.i, label %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, label %n.exit

for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i:                  ; preds = %entry
  %conv3.i = zext i16 %a to i64
  %sub.i.i = shl i64 %conv3.i, 56
  %sub21.i = shl nuw nsw i64 %conv3.i, 2
  %1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %p, i64 %sub21.i
  %2 = getelementptr i8, ptr %1, i64 -262140
  %3 = getelementptr i8, ptr %2, i64 %sub.i.i
  %scevgep.i = getelementptr i8, ptr %3, i64 72057594037927936
  store i16 1285, ptr %scevgep.i, align 2
  br label %n.exit

n.exit:                                           ; preds = %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, %entry
  %4 = load i8, ptr %p, align 2
  %conv = sext i8 %4 to i32
  ret i32 %conv
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "p:64:64:64"

define i32 @pr69096(i16 %a, ptr %p) {
entry:
  %0 = load i8, ptr %p, align 2
  %dec.i = add i8 %0, -1
  %cmp636.i = icmp eq i16 %a, -1
  br i1 %cmp636.i, label %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, label %n.exit

for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i:                  ; preds = %entry
  %conv3.i = zext i16 %a to i64
  %sub.i.i = shl i64 %conv3.i, 56
  %sub21.i = shl nuw nsw i64 %conv3.i, 2
  %1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %p, i64 %sub21.i
  %2 = getelementptr i8, ptr %1, i64 -262140
  %3 = getelementptr i8, ptr %2, i64 %sub.i.i
  %scevgep.i = getelementptr i8, ptr %3, i64 72057594037927936
  store i16 1285, ptr %scevgep.i, align 2
  br label %n.exit

n.exit:                                           ; preds = %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, %entry
  %4 = load i8, ptr %p, align 2
  %conv = sext i8 %4 to i32
  ret i32 %conv
}

issue.title: Wrong code at -O2/3/s on x86_64-linux_gnu since 45ecfed
issue.author: shao-hua-li

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
Bisected to `EarlyCSEPass`.
before:
```
; Function Attrs: nounwind uwtable
define dso_local i32 @main() local_unnamed_addr #2 {
entry:
  %0 = load i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  %dec.i = add i8 %0, -1
  store i8 %dec.i, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  %1 = load ptr, ptr @i, align 8, !tbaa !8
  store i16 0, ptr @c, align 2, !tbaa !10
  %2 = load i16, ptr %1, align 2, !tbaa !10
  %cmp636.i = icmp eq i16 %2, -1
  br i1 %cmp636.i, label %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, label %n.exit

for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i:                  ; preds = %entry
  %conv3.i = zext i16 %2 to i64
  %sub.i.i = shl i64 %conv3.i, 56
  %sub21.i = shl nuw nsw i64 %conv3.i, 2
  %3 = getelementptr i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), i64 %sub21.i
  %4 = getelementptr i8, ptr %3, i64 -262140
  %5 = getelementptr i8, ptr %4, i64 %sub.i.i
  %scevgep.i = getelementptr i8, ptr %5, i64 72057594037927936
  store i16 1285, ptr %scevgep.i, align 2
  store i16 4, ptr @f, align 2, !tbaa !10
  br label %n.exit

n.exit:                                           ; preds = %entry, %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i
  store i16 -1, ptr @c, align 2, !tbaa !10
  %6 = load i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  %conv = sext i8 %6 to i32
  %call = call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr noundef nonnull dereferenceable(1) @.str, i32 noundef %conv)
  ret i32 0
}
```
After:
```
; Function Attrs: nounwind uwtable
define dso_local i32 @main() local_unnamed_addr #2 {
entry:
  %0 = load i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  %dec.i = add i8 %0, -1
  store i8 %dec.i, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  %1 = load ptr, ptr @i, align 8, !tbaa !8
  store i16 0, ptr @c, align 2, !tbaa !10
  %2 = load i16, ptr %1, align 2, !tbaa !10
  %cmp636.i = icmp eq i16 %2, -1
  br i1 %cmp636.i, label %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i, label %n.exit

for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i:                  ; preds = %entry
  %conv3.i = zext i16 %2 to i64
  %sub.i.i = shl i64 %conv3.i, 56
  %sub21.i = shl nuw nsw i64 %conv3.i, 2
  %3 = getelementptr i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), i64 %sub21.i
  %4 = getelementptr i8, ptr %3, i64 -262140
  %5 = getelementptr i8, ptr %4, i64 %sub.i.i
  %scevgep.i = getelementptr i8, ptr %5, i64 72057594037927936
  store i16 1285, ptr %scevgep.i, align 2
  store i16 4, ptr @f, align 2, !tbaa !10
  br label %n.exit

n.exit:                                           ; preds = %entry, %for.cond2.for.inc29_crit_edge.i
  store i16 -1, ptr @c, align 2, !tbaa !10
  ; %6 = load i8, ptr getelementptr inbounds ([10 x [1 x [4 x i8]]], ptr @g, i64 0, i64 0, i64 0, i64 2), align 2, !tbaa !5
  ; It is incorrect to replace %6 with %dec.i due to `store i16 1285, ptr %scevgep.i, align 2`.
  %conv = sext i8 %dec.i to i32
  %call = call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr noundef nonnull dereferenceable(1) @.str, i32 noundef %conv)
  ret i32 0
}
```
